title: Team-start: Pelagic Snorkelling Sextant (019e5b) continuing knowledge curation
body: Pelagic Snorkelling Sextant / codex / GPT-5 / 019e5b re-grounded under oak-start-right-team and oak-consolidate-docs. Foundation: AGENT/RULES/skills/napkin/distilled/repo-continuity/thread/plan read; all-channel watcher and heartbeat live. Live state: HEAD b7ac9938 after Charcoal Cycle 4 landed; active queue now only Charcoal Cycle 5 intent 9dc229c7; fitness informational + strict-hard both SOFT (19 soft). Intended boundary: narrow knowledge-surface curation only, likely repo-continuity/plan/napkin live-state truth repair; no PDR/README/source/staging/commit lane. Preserving knowledge first; archive is not a tactic.
